input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation says YAML, JSON, TOML, and HOCON config files require optional hoplite format modules; generated tests should avoid choosing those formats unless they intentionally add the matching module.
The 3.0.0.RC1 artifact upgrades Kotlin dependencies to 2.1.0, so Gradle/Kotlin compatibility remains something local verification must confirm, but it is not an extra library setup requirement.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core is usable and meaningfully testable with its resolved transitive dependencies only; core APIs cover data-class decoding, built-in decoders, map/system/environment/property sources, and built-in Java properties parsing without Docker, external services, or companion format modules.
